Product Description
Case and Sewn
Section sewn and printed on high quality
white paper, Collins notebooks feature
color-coded covers - feint ruled (blue) and
A-Z index cut (green) books.
Multiple sizes are available.
FEATURES
Available in C7, A6, AS and Quarto sizes
Sewn bound hardcover
70 gsm white paper
